user_query: I completely forgot about souvenirs. Add a stop at Roots or the Hudson's Bay flagship on Day 10 morning before the CN Tower. I need to grab gifts before I fly out.

fields.name: Souvenir Stop — Roots or Hudson's Bay Flagship
fields.description: Quick stop at either the Roots store or the Hudson's Bay flagship to pick up gifts and souvenirs before departure. Both offer a good range of Canadian-branded apparel, accessories, and boxed gifts suitable for last-minute shopping.

result.reasoning: User requested a morning souvenir stop before the CN Tower. Inserting at position 1 places this between the quick hotel breakfast and the CN Tower lunch, giving time to grab gifts before later travel and the flight.
